ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "exp_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "exp_type" INTEGER /* Type of the experiment (e.g., cognitive, emotional, social) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "hypotheses" TEXT /* Hypotheses of the experiment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the experiment */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "ethical_approval" TEXT /* Ethical approval status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_exp_type FOREIGN KEY ("exp_type") REFERENCES exp_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the block belongs to */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block within the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the block */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the block */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions applied in the block */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the block is conducted */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the block is conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial within the block */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "trial_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions applied in the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of the trial (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trial */,
  "trial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  "choice" INTEGER /* Choice made by the participant */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Correct choice (1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response (1 for accurate, 0 for inaccurate) */,
  "slow" INTEGER /* Whether the response was slow (1 for slow, 0 for not slow) */,
  "congruent" INTEGER /* Whether the trial was congruent (1 for congruent, 0 for incongruent) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the participant */,
  "fix_time" REAL /* Fixation time */,
  "gap_time" REAL /* Gap time */,
  "stim_time" REAL /* Stimulus time */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the participant */,
  "trial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity or intensity of the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exp_conditions" (
  "exp_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-condition mapping */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Order in which conditions are applied in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exp_conditions_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exp_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_conditions" (
  "block_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block-condition mapping */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Order in which conditions are applied in the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_conditions_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_conditions" (
  "trial_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-condition mapping */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Order in which conditions are applied in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exp_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)
